CustomField.description: When checked, this session overrides a VS_Holiday__c closure for its facility+date only, so VS-06 slot generation opens this date even though the calendar marks it a holiday (D-018). Set by the MO via the VS-03 screen flow for special vaccination drives (e.g. Sunday drives). Scoped to this one session — does not affect the shared holiday calendar.
CustomField.label: Is Drive Day
